title: Admin to be able to assign time in time-tracking column

posts.author: caliber_agency (Marnie Rogers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

As a project manager, it would be really awesome if I could track time for people in my delivery team within the Time-tracking column. At the moment, you can only track time for your self.

As I’ve got team members that are slow to track-time, or forget often (we all have them!) it would be great if I could add in the hours for them and assign a specific, manual time entry to them/their avatar.

posts.author: EBeer (Elise Beer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @caliber_agency,
Our app Tracket makes it possible to track time for multiple people on an item.
Next to that, we have an approval process in place which allows team managers to track time for their team mates.
You can check out our app on the marketplace: https://monday.com/marketplace/10000017

Please let me know if there are additional questions!
